## Checklist

- [ ] YAML files validated: `kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f FILE`
- [ ] All commands tested on a real cluster (minikube / kind / etc.)
- [ ] No sensitive data (tokens, passwords, keys) included
- [ ] README updated if new files were added
- [ ] Follows commit convention: `feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:`
